title: What's new in v2.67.0
content:
Features:
- Modifier system, starting with 'Animation speed multiplier' modifier
- Added 'Learn' panel

Enhancements:
- Customizable contiguous corners
- Adjustable marching ants opacity
- Palette match for the eyedropper and the main color picker
- Indexed PNG export for indexed file
- Can eyedrop colors on reference layers outside of the canvas
- New custom objects can be added from multiple selected layers
- Distantly linked cels now have a clear indicator
- Customizable eyedropper preview position
- Bottom info bar flips its arrangement when left-hand mode is enabled
- Other UI and functional enhancements

Fixes:
- Cannot reorder tiles to the last index in 'move' mode
- Minor issue with 'Selected layer' option when exporting
